General.Name: AFC Ajax NV
General.Description: AFC Ajax NV operates a football club in the Netherlands. It also operates a stadium and a youth academy. The company was founded in 1900 and is based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.
General.Address: Johan Cruijff Boulevard 29, Amsterdam, Netherlands, 1101 AM
